name: One Night Ultimate Werewolf
description: One Night Ultimate Werewolf is Bezier Games' fast-paced single-night social deduction — every player gets a hidden role (Werewolf, Seer, Robber, Troublemaker, Drunk, Insomniac, Villager, more), the night phase plays out via a free phone-app narrator, and then the village votes on who to lynch in five minutes flat. Roles can be swapped during the night, so by morning nobody is who they think they are.
